channel.title: wireguard on Colin Murphy's site
channel.description: Recent content in wireguard on Colin Murphy's site

item.title: Installing PiVPN on an unprivileged Proxmox LXC Container
item.description: PiVPN is an easy to manage VPN server that can be run on a Raspberry Pi, or in a virtual machine or container. Today, I will be walking you through the process of configuring an unprivileged LXC container in Proxmox to use PiVPN. With newer releases of Proxmox, this process is quite simple and allows you to use an unprivileged container without needing to fiddle around with cgroups. Please note that this guide assumes you are running Proxmox Virtual Environment version 7.
